query:
SELECT st.id, p.batch_no, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) AS sync_status, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eFrontPhotoUrl')) AS front_url, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.eBackPhotoUrl')) AS back_url, JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncMessage')) AS sync_message, st.metadata
FROM station_tasks st
JOIN products p ON p.id = st.product_id
WHERE st.station_code = 'E'
  AND st.task_status = 'completed'
  AND JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(st.metadata, '$.ePhotoSyncStatus')) = 'background_failed'
ORDER BY st.updated_at DESC
LIMIT 10;
